summary: A hugely disciplined 4-4-2 with exceptional wide men and elite defensive numbers — 10 cleansheets in 10. Group E will be so tight.
style: Disciplined 4-4-2 — exceptional wide men in 1v1s and scoring, crosses into the box, counter-attacking at pace.

counterReliance.note: Counter-attacking at pace off a disciplined base

strengths: Exceptional wide men in 1v1s who also score
2 cleansheets on the last-break (countering at pace)

keyPlayers.name: Yan Diomande
keyPlayers.note: Pace, dribbling & skill — 20 goal involvements at Leipzig, 56 chances created, 118 successful dribbles (61%)

tactics: Defend with real discipline, then break at pace through outstanding wide players who both create and finish. Tough to beat and dangerous in transition.
sources: John Walker (@johnwalker_1986) — pre-tournament tactical scouting, May–Jun 2026
